title: fagraea splendens
intro: Fagraea splendens, also known as the Frangipani or Bunga Raya, is a tropical evergreen flowering plant native to the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Fagraea splendens include reducing fever, relieving cough and cold symptoms, and providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. Fagraea splendens can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
